docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 77483715) TO PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
